name: Raphael Pharmaceutical Inc.
business: Raphael Pharmaceutical Inc. is a pharmaceutical drug research and development company focused on the discovery and clinical development of life-improving drug therapies based on cannabinoids, including cannabidiol (CBD) oil, for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis, asthma, and other autoimmune diseases. The company completed a proof-of-concept clinical study for its lead product candidate for rheumatoid arthritis in December 2024 and launched a dietary supplement under the RaphaWell brand for RA support in August 2025. It relies on third-party manufacturers and distributors for commercialization and has no internal manufacturing or sales force.
namedSuppliers: Rambam Health Care Campus (Rambam Med-Tech Ltd.)

exposures.sentence: We are a pharmaceutical drug research and development company focused on the discovery and clinical development of life-improving drug therapies based on cannabinoids, including cannabidiol, or CBD, oil.

catalysts.event: Completion of proof-of-concept clinical study for rheumatoid arthritis product candidate
catalysts.sentence: On December 23, 2024, upon a successful completion of the Study, we received the Study results with overall findings that emphasize the clinical potential of Raphael's Formula and suggest that it may have beneficial effects on symptom management and overall well-being for individuals with RA.

catalysts.event: Launch of RaphaWell dietary supplement for rheumatoid arthritis
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we announced the completion of product development and the launch of our proprietary natural formula under the RaphaWell brand for RA support in the U.S.

catalysts.event: Filing of provisional patent application for neutrophil-dominant autoimmune diseases
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we, jointly with the Medical Cannabis Research and Innovation Center and Rambam, filed a provisional patent application with the USPTO titled Raphael Pharmaceutical, Inc. / Rambam MedTech Formula for Treating Neutrophil-Dominant Autoimmune Diseases (including RA) (Application No. 63/911,729).

tamClaims.claim: The global asthma therapeutics market size was valued at approximately $25.7 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.4% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Global Market Insights report (March 2024), in 2023, the asthma therapeutics market size was valued at approximately $25.7 billion and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate, or CAGR, of 4.4% from 2024 to 2030.
